metaDescription: Professional silverfish elimination in NYC. Moisture control and targeted treatment. Free inspection. 30-day guarantee. Licensed exterminators. Call now.
h1: Silverfish Control in NYC — Eliminated and Kept Out
heroParagraph: Silverfish are a moisture indicator — find them and you've found a humidity or plumbing problem. They feed on paper, book bindings, wallpaper paste, and starches in clothing, and can live for years in the wall voids and crawl spaces of NYC's older buildings. Treatment addresses both the silverfish themselves and the moisture conditions that support them.
